title: barkhausia echioides
intro: Barkhausia echioides, also known as the Indian Staff Tree or Staff Tree, is a deciduous tree native to the tropical forests of Asia. The bark of this plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Barkhausia echioides include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as being used as an antidote for snake bites. Herbal preparations of Barkhausia echioides include decoctions, infusions, and poultices, which can be made from its bark, roots, or leaves.
